title: mentha arvensis var. nummularia
intro: Mentha arvensis var. nummularia, also known as Japanese mint or Chinese peppermint, is a variety of the common mint plant that is native to China and Japan. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis var. nummularia include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve nausea and headaches, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, this plant is often used as a tea, essential oil, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be used as a flavoring agent in foods and beverages.
